docs: Main program module containing all public instruction handlers.
These are the entry points that clients call via transactions.

instructions.name: admin_add_tier
docs: Add a new tier configuration
Authority-only instruction to add a new tier

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority that can modify game configuration

instructions.name: admin_remove_player
docs: Remove a player from a future round (before settlement)
Closes RoundPlayer (v1) PDA, decrements joined_count, refunds entry fee

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority that can remove players

instructions.name: admin_reset_round
docs: Reset a round to Open status with zero players
Used to clear stuck/problematic future rounds

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority that can reset rounds

instructions.name: admin_set_authority
docs: Transfer authority to a new account
Authority-only instruction to transfer control

accounts.name: authority
docs: Current authority (must sign)

accounts.name: new_authority
docs: New authority to transfer to

instructions.name: admin_set_dev_wallet
docs: Update the dev wallet address
Authority-only instruction to change fee recipient

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority that can modify game configuration

accounts.name: new_dev_wallet
docs: New dev wallet address

instructions.name: admin_set_join_authority
docs: Set the join authority for join_round_v2 (pass None to clear)
Authority-only instruction for key rotation without upgrade

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority that can modify join_authority

instructions.name: admin_set_orb_mint
docs: Update the ORB mint address (devnet only)
Authority-only instruction to fix mint authority issues

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority that can modify game configuration

accounts.name: new_orb_mint
docs: New ORB mint

instructions.name: admin_set_paused
docs: Set the paused flag (emergency pause for fund-moving instructions)
Authority-only instruction to pause/unpause the game

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority that can pause/unpause

instructions.name: admin_set_season_rounds
docs: Set the current season's rounds total
Authority-only instruction for testing or season configuration
Excluded from mainnet builds

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority that can modify game configuration

instructions.name: admin_sync_lp_accum
docs: Sync lp_accum_sol to match actual LP vault balance (devnet only)
This allows manual funding of LP vault to count towards genesis threshold

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority that can modify game configuration

instructions.name: admin_update_tier
docs: Update an existing tier configuration
Authority-only instruction to update all tier settings

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority that can modify game configuration

accounts.name: root_account
docs: Root account PDA - canonical game state

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA (signs Raydium CLMM CPI)

accounts.name: lp_vault
docs: LP accumulation vault - WSOL source for buybacks

accounts.name: orb_mint
docs: ORB mint - must match root_account.orb_mint

accounts.name: orb_lp_vault
docs: ORB LP vault - ORB destination for buybacks (staging for liquidity deployment)

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program - pinned to known program ID

accounts.name: orb_mint
docs: The ORB token mint

accounts.name: program_vault
docs: Program-owned vault to receive minted ORB tokens

accounts.name: mint_authority
docs: Mint authority PDA (used for minting tokens)

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA (token authority for program_vault)

accounts.name: pool
docs: CLMM pool account

instructions.name: claim_referral_rewards
docs: Claim pending referral rewards
Allows a referrer to claim accumulated SOL rewards from their referrals

accounts.name: player_profile
docs: The referrer's PlayerProfile (holds pending_referral_rewards)
PDA: ["player_profile", referrer.key()]

accounts.name: referral_vault
docs: Referral vault that holds the referral rewards
PDA: ["referral_vault"]

accounts.name: referrer
docs: The referrer claiming their rewards (signer)

accounts.name: round_page
docs: RoundPage PDA to verify round is settled

accounts.name: player_stats
docs: Player's stats account

accounts.name: player
docs: The player converting points

accounts.name: player_orb_account
docs: Player's ORB token account (destination)
Created if needed - player pays for their own ATA

accounts.name: program_vault
docs: Program vault holding ORB tokens (Season 0 only)
PDA: ["program_vault"]

accounts.name: season_pool_vault
docs: Season pool vault for the season being claimed
PDA: ["season_pool_vault", season_id.to_be_bytes()]
Will be closed if all ORB has been claimed

accounts.name: season_snapshot
docs: Season snapshot account (required for Season 1+ claims)
PDA: ["season_snapshot", season_id.to_be_bytes()]
Will be closed if all ORB has been claimed

accounts.name: dev_wallet
docs: Developer wallet - receives rent when accounts are closed

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA

accounts.name: orb_mint
docs: ORB token mint

accounts.name: root_account
docs: Root account containing global game state

accounts.name: round_page
docs: Round page containing the settled round

accounts.name: season_snapshot
docs: Season snapshot for tracking emissions

accounts.name: orb_mint
docs: ORB token mint

accounts.name: mint_authority
docs: Mint authority PDA

accounts.name: season_pool_vault
docs: Season pool vault for collecting emission share

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token program

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority (must match root_account.authority)

accounts.name: root_account
docs: Root account PDA - canonical game state

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA (signs Raydium CPI)

instructions.name: init_player_profile
docs: Initialize a player profile account
Creates an empty profile that can receive referral rewards
Nickname can be set later via set_nickname

accounts.name: player_profile
docs: The player's profile account
PDA: ["player_profile", player.key()]

instructions.name: init_referral
docs: Initialize referral relationship
Allows a player to set their referrer (one-time only)
The referrer must be a valid player who has played at least one round

accounts.name: referral
docs: The referral account to initialize
PDA: ["referral", player.key()]

accounts.name: player
docs: The player being referred (signer)

accounts.name: referrer
docs: The referrer's account (must have a PlayerProfile)

accounts.name: referrer_profile
docs: Referrer's PlayerProfile to verify they're a valid player
PDA: ["player_profile", referrer.key()]

accounts.name: referrer_referral
docs: Referrer's existing referral account (if any) to check for circular referrals
PDA: ["referral", referrer.key()]

instructions.name: init_referral_vault
docs: Initialize the referral vault PDA
Call this once after upgrading an existing deployment

accounts.name: root_account
docs: Root account (to verify authority)

accounts.name: referral_vault
docs: Referral vault - holds SOL for referral rewards
PDA: ["referral_vault"]

accounts.name: program_vault
docs: Program vault for Season 0 conversions and genesis minting
PDA: ["program_vault"]

accounts.name: orb_mint
docs: ORB token mint

accounts.name: wsol_mint
docs: WSOL mint (native SOL)

accounts.name: clmm_pool
docs: CLMM pool address (Raydium CLMM pool for ORB/WSOL)

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA

accounts.name: lp_vault
docs: LP accumulation vault - WSOL TokenAccount for liquidity bootstrap
PDA: ["lp_vault"]

accounts.name: orb_lp_vault
docs: ORB LP vault - ORB destination for buybacks (separate from program vault)
PDA: ["orb_lp_vault"]

accounts.name: referral_vault
docs: Referral vault - holds SOL for referral rewards
PDA: ["referral_vault"]

accounts.name: root_account
docs: Root account PDA - canonical game state

accounts.name: vault
docs: Vault PDA seeded by tier_id and round_id

accounts.name: round_page
docs: RoundPage containing the round slot (zero_copy)
PDA: ["round_page", tier_id.to_be_bytes(), page_index.to_be_bytes()]

accounts.name: round_player
docs: RoundPlayer PDA: proves player joined this round.
Using `init` instead of `init_if_needed` ensures uniqueness -
if player already joined, this will fail with AccountAlreadyInUse.
PDA: ["rp", tier_id.to_be_bytes(), round_id.to_be_bytes(), player]

accounts.name: dev_wallet
docs: Dev wallet receives dev fee - constrained to match root_account.dev_wallet

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA - token authority for vaults

accounts.name: lp_vault
docs: LP accumulation vault - WSOL TokenAccount for liquidity bootstrap
INVARIANT: lp_vault.amount is stale until sync_native is called in liquidity instructions.
We intentionally transfer SOL here and defer sync_native to OpenPosition/Buyback/Deploy.
Do NOT read lp_vault.amount in this instruction.

accounts.name: referral
docs: Optional: Referral account if player was referred
PDA: ["referral", player.key()] - validated at runtime

accounts.name: referrer_stats
docs: Optional: Referrer's PlayerStats account to award points
PDA: ["ps", season_id, referrer.key()] - validated at runtime

accounts.name: referrer_profile
docs: Optional: Referrer's PlayerProfile account for referral tracking
PDA: ["player_profile", referrer.key()] - validated at runtime

accounts.name: referral_vault
docs: Optional: Referral vault to hold referral rewards
PDA: ["referral_vault"] - validated at runtime

accounts.name: root_account
docs: Root account PDA - canonical game state

accounts.name: vault
docs: Vault PDA seeded by tier_id and round_id

accounts.name: round_page
docs: RoundPage containing the round slot (zero_copy)

accounts.name: round_player
docs: RoundPlayerV2 PDA: proves player joined this round with config hash.
Using `init` ensures uniqueness - if player already joined, this will fail.

accounts.name: dev_wallet
docs: Dev wallet receives dev fee

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA - token authority for vaults

accounts.name: lp_vault
docs: LP accumulation vault - WSOL TokenAccount for liquidity bootstrap

accounts.name: join_authority
docs: Join authority must match root_account.join_authority

accounts.name: referral
docs: Optional: Referral account if player was referred

accounts.name: referrer_stats
docs: Optional: Referrer's PlayerStats account to award points

accounts.name: referrer_profile
docs: Optional: Referrer's PlayerProfile account for referral tracking

accounts.name: referral_vault
docs: Optional: Referral vault to hold referral rewards

accounts.name: root_account
docs: Root account PDA - canonical game state

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA (signs Raydium Lock CPI)

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program - pinned to known program ID

accounts.name: root_account
docs: Root account PDA - canonical game state

accounts.name: orb_mint
docs: ORB token mint - must match root_account.orb_mint

accounts.name: program_vault
docs: Program vault (holds ORB tokens)

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA (signs Raydium CPI and transfers)

accounts.name: lp_vault
docs: LP accumulation vault - WSOL TokenAccount for liquidity bootstrap

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program - pinned to known program ID

accounts.name: root_account
docs: Root account PDA - canonical game state

accounts.name: round_page
docs: RoundPage PDA: ["round_page", tier_id.to_be_bytes(), page_index.to_be_bytes()]

accounts.name: vault
docs: Vault PDA - must be system-owned (holds SOL)

accounts.name: dev_wallet
docs: Dev wallet - constrained to match root_account.dev_wallet

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority - must match root_account.authority

instructions.name: set_nickname
docs: Set a unique nickname for a player
Costs 0.2 SOL and nicknames are globally unique
Players can change their nickname by paying the fee again

accounts.name: root_account
docs: Root account PDA - canonical game state

accounts.name: player_profile
docs: The player's profile account (tracks current nickname)
PDA: ["player_profile", player.key()]

accounts.name: nickname_account
docs: The new nickname account to create
PDA: ["nickname", lowercase_nickname_bytes]
Note: Nickname length is validated in handler (3-16 chars, alphanumeric + underscore)

accounts.name: old_nickname_account
docs: The old nickname account to close (if changing nickname)
PDA: ["nickname", old_lowercase_nickname_bytes]

accounts.name: player
docs: The player setting their nickname

accounts.name: dev_wallet
docs: Dev wallet receives the nickname fee - constrained to match root_account.dev_wallet

accounts.name: player_stats
docs: Player stats for current season - awards bonus points on first nickname
PDA: ["ps", season_id, player.key()]

accounts.name: round_page
docs: RoundPage containing the round being settled (zero_copy)
PDA: ["round_page", tier_id.to_be_bytes(), page_index.to_be_bytes()]

accounts.name: dev_wallet
docs: Dev wallet - constrained to match root_account.dev_wallet

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA (token authority for season_pool_vault)

accounts.name: season_pool_vault
docs: Season pool vault for current season (receives pool emissions)
Created with vault_authority as token authority for proper claims.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token program (required for vault creation and transfers) - pinned to known program ID

accounts.name: season_snapshot
docs: Season snapshot account (created automatically when season ends)

accounts.name: root_account
docs: Root account PDA - canonical game state

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA (owns the position NFT)

accounts.name: position_nft_mint
docs: Position NFT mint - validated against clmm_cfg.position_nft

accounts.name: vault_authority_nft_account
docs: Vault authority's ATA for position NFT (source)

accounts.name: dev_wallet_nft_account
docs: Dev wallet's ATA for position NFT (destination)

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token program - pinned to known program ID

accounts.name: round_page
docs: RoundPage PDA: ["round_page", tier_id.to_be_bytes(), page_index.to_be_bytes()]

instructions.name: withdraw_lp_vault
docs: Emergency withdraw all SOL from LP vault
Authority-only instruction to recover funds - devnet only

accounts.name: root_account
docs: Root account PDA - canonical game state

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA (signs transfers)

accounts.name: lp_vault
docs: LP vault - WSOL TokenAccount to withdraw from

accounts.name: destination
docs: Destination for withdrawn SOL (authority's wallet)

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority that can withdraw (must match root_account.authority)

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token program for WSOL operations

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for closing account

errors.name: RoundNotOpen
errors.msg: Round is not open for joining

errors.name: AlreadyJoined
errors.msg: Player has already joined this round

errors.name: RoundNotSettled
errors.msg: Round is not settled or canceled

errors.name: RoundIdMismatch
errors.msg: Round account does not match the provided id

errors.name: PastRoundId
errors.msg: Round id is in the past

errors.name: MissingSeed
errors.msg: Round seed is required for emission randomness

errors.name: AlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Already claimed pool for this season

errors.name: InvalidPageIndex
errors.msg: Invalid page index - must match tier's current_page_index

errors.name: PayoutNotProcessed
errors.msg: Payout not yet processed - cannot close account

errors.name: StatsNotApplied
errors.msg: Stats not yet applied - cannot close account

errors.name: ReferrerNotValid
errors.msg: Referrer must be a valid player with stats

errors.name: CircularReferral
errors.msg: Circular referral not allowed - referrer is already referred by you

errors.name: InvalidNickname
errors.msg: Invalid nickname (must be 3-20 alphanumeric chars or underscores)

errors.name: NicknameAlreadyTaken
errors.msg: Nickname already taken by another player

errors.name: InvalidEmissionReceiver
errors.msg: Invalid emission receiver - ATA does not match joiner

errors.name: InvalidEmissionOrder
errors.msg: Invalid emission order - joiners not sorted by join_ts

errors.name: NotEligible
errors.msg: Not eligible - must have played at least one round

errors.name: InvalidRoundPlayerPda
errors.msg: Invalid RoundPlayer PDA - does not match canonical seeds

errors.name: InvalidAta
errors.msg: Invalid ATA - does not match canonical associated token address

errors.name: EmissionAlreadyProcessed
errors.msg: Emission already processed for this round

errors.name: GamePaused
errors.msg: Game is paused - fund-moving operations disabled

errors.name: InvalidMultiplier
errors.msg: Invalid multiplier - must be between 100 and 300

errors.name: InvalidMintAuthority
errors.msg: Invalid mint authority - must be program's mint_authority PDA

errors.name: JoinV1Disabled
errors.msg: join_round v1 is disabled - use join_round_v2

types.name: ClmmCfg
docs: CLMM (Concentrated Liquidity Market Maker) pool configuration

types.name: Nickname
docs: Nickname account - maps a unique nickname to a player
PDA: ["nickname", lowercase_nickname_bytes]

fields.name: owner
docs: The player who owns this nickname

fields.name: nickname
docs: The actual nickname string (max 20 chars)

fields.name: claimed_at
docs: Timestamp when nickname was claimed

types.name: PlayerProfile
docs: PlayerProfile account - tracks a player's profile and referral data
PDA: ["player_profile", player_pubkey]

fields.name: player
docs: The player who owns this profile

fields.name: current_nickname
docs: The player's current nickname (empty string if none set)

fields.name: pending_referral_rewards
docs: Pending referral rewards to claim (in lamports)
Accumulated when referred players join rounds

fields.name: total_referral_claimed
docs: Total referral rewards claimed (in lamports)

fields.name: referral_count
docs: Number of players referred

fields.name: referral_points_earned
docs: Total points earned from referrals (20 points per referral + checkpoint bonuses)

types.name: PlayerStats
docs: Player statistics account, keyed by season and player pubkey.
PDA: ["ps", season_id.to_be_bytes(), player_pubkey]
Note: player_pubkey is not stored since PDA derivation proves ownership

fields.name: checkpoints_season
docs: 256-bit bitmap for seasonal one-time awards (resets each season)

fields.name: checkpoints_global
docs: 64-bit bitmap for global/lifetime one-time awards

fields.name: last_win_round_id
docs: Last round ID where player won (for streak tracking)

fields.name: win_streak
docs: Current consecutive win streak (reset on non-win)

types.name: Referral
docs: Referral account - tracks who referred a player
Rewards are accumulated in the referrer's PlayerStats.pending_referral_rewards
PDA: ["referral", player.key()]

fields.name: player
docs: The player who was referred

fields.name: referrer
docs: The player who referred them

fields.name: created_at
docs: Timestamp when referral was set

fields.name: counted
docs: Whether this referral has been counted in referrer's referral_count

types.name: RoundPage
docs: Paged storage for rounds - holds PAGE_SIZE rounds per account
PDA: ["round_page", tier_id.to_be_bytes(), page_index.to_be_bytes()]
Uses zero_copy for memory-mapped access to avoid stack overflow

types.name: SeasonSnapshot
docs: Snapshot of a completed season for prize pool distribution.
This account is created when a season ends and contains all the data
needed for players to claim their proportional share of the season prize pool.
PDA: ["season_snapshot", season_id.to_be_bytes()]

fields.name: season_id
docs: The season ID this snapshot represents

fields.name: total_points
docs: Total points earned by all players during this season

fields.name: pool_orb_atoms
docs: Total ORB atoms available in the prize pool for this season

fields.name: orbs_claimed
docs: Total ORB atoms that have been claimed so far

fields.name: finalized
docs: Whether this snapshot is finalized and ready for claims

types.name: SeedVerificationArgs
docs: Arguments for Merkle-based seed verification

fields.name: chunk_id
docs: The chunk ID this seed belongs to (round_id / CHUNK_SIZE)

fields.name: merkle_root
docs: Merkle root of the chunk's seed tree

fields.name: root_signature
docs: ECDSA signature over the chunk root message

fields.name: seed
docs: The actual seed for this round

fields.name: proof_siblings
docs: Sibling hashes for Merkle proof (from leaf to root)

fields.name: proof_positions
docs: Position flags: false = current hash is left child, true = current hash is right child
